name: Landmark Greenwood Village Fresh Market
notes: On-file website (http://coloradofreshmarkets.com/markets/) is dead (404), as are /schedule and /markets on that domain. The operator 'Colorado Fresh Markets' rebranded its live site (coloradofreshmarkets.com) to promote only its 'Cherry Creek Fresh Market' (Saturdays, Cherry Creek Shopping Center, May-Oct 2026); it no longer references a Greenwood Village/Landmark location anywhere on the site or in recent Facebook search results. The property itself (The Landmark at Greenwood Village / landmarkdtc.com and its Facebook/Instagram) has no events page or posts mentioning a farmers/fresh market. I could not locate any current, legitimate official website or Facebook page confirming this specific market is still operating in 2026, so no fields could be verified from an official source. Third-party aggregators (Foraged, NFMD, GivingGarden, ColoradoInfo) list plausible historical details (e.g. Fridays 10am-2pm, June-Sept, indoor space, SNAP/organic vendors possible) but per instructions these were not used since they are not official sources and could not be corroborated. Recommend treating this listing as likely discontinued/absorbed into Cherry Creek Fresh Market pending direct confirmation.
